caption: A man with tall, stylized gray hair and glasses is recording a podcast in a studio setting. He wears a white button-down shirt with light-colored suspenders and a bow tie, along with over-ear headphones. He sits before a black professional microphone on a boom arm. In the background, a woman with pink hair is partially visible, and a framed picture of a shield logo hangs on the wall. On-screen graphics include a logo on the left that reads "BEST TALK PODCAST" and text on the right that says "BEST TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar seated position, shifting his gaze slightly and adjusting his facial expression as he speaks into the microphone. The background elements, including the woman and the studio decor, remain largely static as the camera focuses on the man's profile.
